Package org.apache.juneau.marshall

Class MarshallingContext

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.marshall.Context
org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshallingContext
All Implemented Interfaces:
BeanTypeResolver, ConversionFinder
public class MarshallingContext extends Context implements ConversionFinder, BeanTypeResolver
Bean context.

This class servers multiple purposes:

  • Provides the ability to wrap beans inside Map interfaces.
  • Serves as a repository for metadata on POJOs, such as associated @Marshalled annotations, PropertyNamers, etc... which are used to tailor how POJOs are serialized and parsed.

All serializers and parsers use this context so that they can handle POJOs using a common framework.

Bean Contexts

Bean contexts are created through the MarshallingContext.create() and MarshallingContext.Builder.build() methods.
These context objects are read-only, reusable, and thread-safe.

Each bean context maintains a cache of ClassMeta objects that describe information about classes encountered. These ClassMeta objects are time-consuming to construct. Therefore, instances of MarshallingContext that share the same "MarshallingContext.*" property values share the same cache. This allows for efficient reuse of ClassMeta objects so that the information about classes only needs to be calculated once. Because of this, many of the properties defined on the MarshallingContext class cannot be overridden on the session.

Bean Sessions

Whereas MarshallingContext objects are permanent, unchangeable, cached, and thread-safe, MarshallingSession objects are ephemeral and not thread-safe. They are meant to be used as quickly-constructed scratchpads for creating bean maps. BeanMap objects can only be created through the session.

MarshallingContext configuration properties

BeanContexts have several configuration properties that can be used to tweak behavior on how beans are handled. These are denoted as the static BEAN_* fields on this class.

Some settings (e.g. MarshallingContext.Builder.beansRequireDefaultConstructor()) are used to differentiate between bean and non-bean classes. Attempting to create a bean map around one of these objects will throw a BeanRuntimeException. The purpose for this behavior is so that the serializers can identify these non-bean classes and convert them to plain strings using the Object.toString() method.

Some settings (e.g. MarshallingContext.Builder.beanFieldVisibility(Visibility)) are used to determine what kinds of properties are detected on beans.

Some settings (e.g. MarshallingContext.Builder.beanMapPutReturnsOldValue()) change the runtime behavior of bean maps.

Example:

// Construct a context from scratch. MarshallingContext marshallingContext = MarshallingContext .create() .beansRequireDefaultConstructor() .notBeanClasses(Foo.class) .build();

Bean Maps

BeanMaps are wrappers around Java beans that allow properties to be retrieved and set using the common Map.put(Object,Object) and Map.get(Object) methods.

Bean maps are created in two ways...

  1. MarshallingSession.toBeanMap() - Wraps an existing bean inside a Map wrapper.
  2. MarshallingSession.newBeanMap() - Create a new bean instance wrapped in a Map wrapper.
Example:

// A sample bean class public class Person { public String getName(); public void setName(String name); public int getAge(); public void setAge(int age); } // Create a new bean session MarshallingSession session = MarshallingContext.DEFAULT.createSession(); // Wrap an existing bean in a new bean map BeanMap<Person> map1 = session.toBeanMap(new Person()); map1.put("name", "John Smith"); map1.put("age", 45); // Create a new bean instance wrapped in a new bean map BeanMap<Person> map2 = session.newBeanMap(Person.class); map2.put("name", "John Smith"); map2.put("age", 45); Person person = map2.getBean(); // Get the bean instance that was created.

Notes:
  • This class is thread safe and reusable.
See Also:

  • Field Details

    • DEFAULT

      public static final MarshallingContext DEFAULT
      Default config. All default settings.

    • DEFAULT_SESSION

      public static final MarshallingSession DEFAULT_SESSION
      Default reusable unmodifiable session. Can be used to avoid overhead of creating a session (for creating BeanMaps for example).

  • Constructor Details

    • MarshallingContext

      public MarshallingContext(MarshallingContext.Builder builder)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      builder - The builder for this object.

  • Method Details

    • create

      public static MarshallingContext.Builder create()
      Creates a new builder for this object.
      Returns:
      A new builder.

    • convertToType

      public final <T> T convertToType(Object value, Class<T> type) throws InvalidDataConversionException
      Converts the specified value to the specified class type.

      This is a shortcut for the following code: createSession().build().convertToType(value, type);

      Type Parameters:
      T - The class type to convert the value to.
      Parameters:
      value - The value to convert.
      type - The class type to convert the value to.
      Returns:
      The converted value.
      Throws:
      InvalidDataConversionException - If the specified value cannot be converted to the specified type.
      See Also:
      • MarshallingSession.convertToType(Object, Class)

    • copy

      public MarshallingContext.Builder copy()
      Description copied from class: Context
      Creates a builder from this context object.

      Builders are used to define new contexts (e.g. serializers, parsers) based on existing configurations.

      Overrides:
      copy in class Context
      Returns:
      A new Builder object.

    • createSession

      public MarshallingSession.Builder<?> createSession()
      Description copied from class: Context
      Create a session builder based on the properties defined on this context.

      Use this method for creating sessions where you want to override basic settings. Otherwise, use Context.getSession() directly.

      Overrides:
      createSession in class Context
      Returns:
      A new session builder.

    • getBeanClassVisibility

      public final Visibility getBeanClassVisibility()
      Minimum bean class visibility.
      Returns:
      Classes are not considered beans unless they meet the minimum visibility requirements.
      See Also:
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.beanClassVisibility(Visibility)

    • getBeanConstructorVisibility

      public final Visibility getBeanConstructorVisibility()
      Minimum bean constructor visibility.
      Returns:
      Only look for constructors with this specified minimum visibility.
      See Also:
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.beanConstructorVisibility(Visibility)

    • getBeanStore

      public final BeanStore getBeanStore()
      The bean store used for factory-based instantiation.
      Returns:
      The bean store, or null if none configured.
      See Also:
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.beanStore(BeanStore)

    • getBeanDictionary

      public final List<ClassInfo> getBeanDictionary()
      Bean dictionary.
      Returns:
      The list of classes that make up the bean dictionary in this bean context.
      Never null.
      List is unmodifiable.
      See Also:
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.beanDictionary()

    • getBeanConfigContext

      public final BeanConfigContext getBeanConfigContext()
      Returns the BeanConfigContext snapshot for this marshalling context.

      The snapshot lifts the bean-modeling subset of this context's settings into a portable POJO that the bean-modeling runtime in commons.bean can consume without referencing any marshalling-aware types. It is computed lazily on first access and cached for the lifetime of this context.

      Mutating the returned snapshot's settings (via BeanConfigContext.copy() and a fresh build) does not affect this marshalling context.

      Returns:
      The bean-modeling configuration snapshot. Never null.

    • getBeanFieldVisibility

      public final Visibility getBeanFieldVisibility()
      Minimum bean field visibility.
      Returns:
      Only look for bean fields with this specified minimum visibility.
      See Also:
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.beanFieldVisibility(Visibility)

    • getConverter

      public final ConfigurableConverter getConverter()
      Returns the converter for this context.
      Returns:
      The converter.

    • findConversion

      public Conversion<?,?> findConversion(Class<?> inType, Class<?> outType)
      Implements ConversionFinder to provide all MarshallingContext-specific type conversions that cannot be expressed in BasicConverter (which has no dependency on juneau-marshall).

      Conversions are resolved in this priority order:

      1. ObjectSwap-based conversions (highest priority)
      2. Iso8601 date/time formatting and parsing
      3. Epoch-millis to date/time
      4. Map/Bean/Collection/Array to String via serializer
      5. String/CharSequence to Array, Map, Collection via JSON parsing
      6. Map to Bean and String to Bean via BeanMap
      7. Calendar/Date specialized copies
      8. InputStream and Reader construction
      Specified by:
      findConversion in interface ConversionFinder
      Parameters:
      inType - The input type class.
      outType - The output type class.
      Returns:
      A matching Conversion, or null if none applies.

    • getBeanMeta

      public final <T> BeanMeta<T> getBeanMeta(Class<T> c)
      Returns the BeanMeta class for the specified class.
      Type Parameters:
      T - The class type to get the meta-data on.
      Parameters:
      c - The class to get the meta-data on.
      Cannot be null.
      Returns:
      The BeanMeta for the specified class, or null if the class is not a bean per the settings on this context.

    • getBeanMethodVisibility

      public final Visibility getBeanMethodVisibility()
      Minimum bean method visibility.
      Returns:
      Only look for bean methods with this specified minimum visibility.
      See Also:
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.beanMethodVisibility(Visibility)

    • getBeanTypePropertyName

      public final String getBeanTypePropertyName()
      Bean type property name.
      Returns:
      The name of the bean property used to store the dictionary name of a bean type so that the parser knows the data type to reconstruct.
      See Also:
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.typePropertyName(String)

    • getClassMeta

      public final <T> ClassMeta<T> getClassMeta(Class<T> type)
      Construct a ClassMeta wrapper around a Class object.
      Type Parameters:
      T - The class type being wrapped.
      Parameters:
      type - The class to resolve.
      Returns:
      If the class is not an array, returns a cached ClassMeta object. Otherwise, returns a new ClassMeta object every time.

    • getClassMeta

      public final <T> ClassMeta<T> getClassMeta(Type type, Type... args)
      Used to resolve ClassMetas of type Collection and Map that have ClassMeta values that themselves could be collections or maps.

      Collection meta objects are assumed to be followed by zero or one meta objects indicating the element type.

      Map meta objects are assumed to be followed by zero or two meta objects indicating the key and value types.

      The array can be arbitrarily long to indicate arbitrarily complex data structures.

      Examples:
      • getClassMeta(String.class); - A normal type.
      • getClassMeta(List.class); - A list containing objects.
      • getClassMeta(List.class, String.class); - A list containing strings.
      • getClassMeta(LinkedList.class, String.class); - A linked-list containing strings.
      • getClassMeta(LinkedList.class, LinkedList.class, String.class); - A linked-list containing linked-lists of strings.
      • getClassMeta(Map.class); - A map containing object keys/values.
      • getClassMeta(Map.class, String.class, String.class); - A map containing string keys/values.
      • getClassMeta(Map.class, String.class, List.class, MyBean.class); - A map containing string keys and values of lists containing beans.
      Type Parameters:
      T - The class to resolve.
      Parameters:
      type - The class to resolve.
      Can be any of the following: ClassMeta, ClassInfo, Class, ParameterizedType, GenericArrayType
      args - The type arguments of the class if it's a collection or map.
      Can be any of the following: ClassMeta, ClassInfo, Class, ParameterizedType, GenericArrayType
      Ignored if the main type is not a map or collection.
      Returns:
      The resolved class meta.

    • getClassMetaForObject

      public final <T> ClassMeta<T> getClassMetaForObject(T o)
      Shortcut for calling getClassMeta(o.getClass()).
      Type Parameters:
      T - The class of the object being passed in.
      Parameters:
      o - The class to find the class type for.
      Cannot be null.
      Returns:
      The ClassMeta object.

      Returns:
      The default locale for serializer and parser sessions.

      public final TimeZone getDefaultTimeZone()
      Time zone.
      Returns:
      The default timezone for serializer and parser sessions.

    • getNotBeanPackagesNames

      public final Set<String> getNotBeanPackagesNames()
      Bean package exclusions.
      Returns:
      The set of fully-qualified package names to exclude from being classified as beans.
      Never null.
      Set is unmodifiable.
      Backed by a LinkedHashSet to preserve insertion order.
      See Also:
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.notBeanPackages(String...)

    • getPropertyNamer

      public final PropertyNamer getPropertyNamer()
      Bean property namer.
      Returns:
      The interface used to calculate bean property names.
      See Also:
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.propertyNamer(Class)

    • getSession

      public MarshallingSession getSession()
      Description copied from class: Context
      Returns a session to use for this context.

      Note that subclasses may opt to return a reusable non-modifiable session.

      Overrides:
      getSession in class Context
      Returns:
      A new session object.

    • getSwaps

      public final List<ObjectSwap<?,?>> getSwaps()
      Java object swaps.
      Returns:
      The list POJO swaps defined.
      Never null.
      List is unmodifiable.
      See Also:
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.swaps(Class...)

    • hasSameCache

      public final boolean hasSameCache(MarshallingContext bc)
      Returns true if the specified bean context shares the same cache as this bean context.

      Useful for testing purposes.

      Parameters:
      bc - The bean context to compare to.
      Cannot be null.
      Returns:
      true if the bean contexts have equivalent settings and thus share caches.

    • isBeanMapPutReturnsOldValue

      public final boolean isBeanMapPutReturnsOldValue()
      BeanMap.put() returns old property value.
      Returns:
      true if the BeanMap.put() method will return old property values.
      Otherwise, it returns null.
      See Also:
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.beanMapPutReturnsOldValue()

    • isBeansRequireDefaultConstructor

      public final boolean isBeansRequireDefaultConstructor()
      Beans require no-arg constructors.
      Returns:
      true if a Java class must implement a default no-arg constructor to be considered a bean.
      Otherwise, the bean will be serialized as a string using the Object.toString() method.
      See Also:
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.beansRequireDefaultConstructor()

    • isBeansRequireSerializable

      public final boolean isBeansRequireSerializable()
      Beans require Serializable interface.
      Returns:
      true if a Java class must implement the Serializable interface to be considered a bean.
      Otherwise, the bean will be serialized as a string using the Object.toString() method.
      See Also:
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.beansRequireSerializable()

    • isBeansRequireSettersForGetters

      public final boolean isBeansRequireSettersForGetters()
      Beans require setters for getters.
      Returns:
      true if only getters that have equivalent setters will be considered as properties on a bean.
      Otherwise, they are ignored.
      See Also:
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.beansRequireSettersForGetters()

    • isBeansRequireSomeProperties

      public final boolean isBeansRequireSomeProperties()
      Beans require at least one property.
      Returns:
      true if a Java class doesn't need to contain at least 1 property to be considered a bean.
      Otherwise, the bean is serialized as a string using the Object.toString() method.
      See Also:
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.disableBeansRequireSomeProperties()

    • isFindFluentSetters

      public final boolean isFindFluentSetters()
      Find fluent setters.
      Description:

      Returns:
      true if fluent setters are detected on beans.
      See Also:
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.findFluentSetters()

    • isIgnoreInvocationExceptionsOnGetters

      public final boolean isIgnoreInvocationExceptionsOnGetters()
      Ignore invocation errors on getters.
      Returns:
      true if errors thrown when calling bean getter methods are silently ignored.
      See Also:
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.ignoreInvocationExceptionsOnGetters()

    • isIgnoreInvocationExceptionsOnSetters

      public final boolean isIgnoreInvocationExceptionsOnSetters()
      Ignore invocation errors on setters.
      Returns:
      true if errors thrown when calling bean setter methods are silently ignored.
      See Also:
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.ignoreInvocationExceptionsOnSetters()

    • isIgnoreMissingSetters

      public final boolean isIgnoreMissingSetters()
      Silently ignore missing setters.
      Returns:
      true if trying to set a value on a bean property without a setter should throw a BeanRuntimeException.
      See Also:
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.disableIgnoreMissingSetters()

    • isIgnoreUnknownBeanProperties

      public final boolean isIgnoreUnknownBeanProperties()
      Ignore unknown properties.
      Returns:
      true if trying to set a value on a non-existent bean property is silently ignored.
      Otherwise, a RuntimeException is thrown.
      See Also:
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.ignoreUnknownBeanProperties()

    • isValidateSchema

      public final boolean isValidateSchema()
      Schema validation mode.
      Returns:
      true if bean property values should be validated against their @Schema-declared constraints during parsing and serialization.
      Since:
      10.0.0
      See Also:
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.validateSchema()

    • isIgnoreUnknownEnumValues

      public final boolean isIgnoreUnknownEnumValues()
      Ignore unknown enum values.
      Returns:
      true if unknown enum values should be set as null instead of throwing an exception.
      See Also:
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.ignoreUnknownEnumValues()

    • isIgnoreUnknownNullBeanProperties

      public final boolean isIgnoreUnknownNullBeanProperties()
      Ignore unknown properties with null values.
      Returns:
      true if trying to set a null value on a non-existent bean property should throw a BeanRuntimeException.
      See Also:
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.disableIgnoreUnknownNullBeanProperties()

    • isUnsortedProperties

      public final boolean isUnsortedProperties()
      Returns whether bean properties are unsorted (i.e. in natural JVM order rather than alphabetical).
      Returns:
      true if bean properties are in natural JVM order; false (the default) means alphabetical order.
      See Also:
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.unsortedProperties()

    • isUseInterfaceProxies

      public final boolean isUseInterfaceProxies()
      Use interface proxies.
      Returns:
      true if interfaces will be instantiated as proxy classes through the use of an InvocationHandler if there is no other way of instantiating them.
      See Also:
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.disableInterfaceProxies()

    • isUseJavaBeanIntrospector

      public final boolean isUseJavaBeanIntrospector()
      Use Java Introspector.
      Returns:
      true if the built-in Java bean introspector should be used for bean introspection.
      See Also:
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.useJavaBeanIntrospector()

    • newBeanMap

      public <T> BeanMap<T> newBeanMap(Class<T> c)
      Creates a new BeanMap object (a modifiable Map) of the given class with uninitialized property values.

      This is a shortcut for the following code: createSession().build().newBeanMap(_class);

      Example:

      // Construct a new bean map wrapped around a new Person object BeanMap<Person> beanMap = MarshallingContext.DEFAULT.newBeanMap(Person.class);

      Type Parameters:
      T - The class of the object being wrapped.
      Parameters:
      c - The name of the class to create a new instance of.
      Cannot be null.
      Returns:
      A new instance of the class.
      See Also:
      • MarshallingSession.newBeanMap(Class)

    • toBeanMap

      public <T> BeanMap<T> toBeanMap(T object)
      Wraps an object inside a BeanMap object (a modifiable Map).

      This is a shortcut for the following code: createSession().build().toBeanMap(object);

      Example:

      // Construct a bean map around a bean instance BeanMap<Person> beanMap = MarshallingContext.DEFAULT.toBeanMap(new Person());

      Type Parameters:
      T - The class of the object being wrapped.
      Parameters:
      object - The object to wrap in a map interface.
      Cannot be null.
      Returns:
      The wrapped object.
      See Also:
      • MarshallingSession.toBeanMap(Object)

    • getBeanRegistry

      protected final BeanRegistry getBeanRegistry()
      Returns the lookup table for resolving bean types by name.
      Returns:
      The lookup table for resolving bean types by name.

    • getBeanToStringSerializer

      protected WriterSerializer getBeanToStringSerializer()
      Returns the serializer to use for serializing beans when using the MarshallingSession.convertToType(Object, Class) and related methods.
      Returns:
      The serializer. May be null if all initialization has occurred.

    • getCmCache

      protected final Cache<Class,ClassMeta> getCmCache()
      Class metadata cache.
      Returns:
      The class metadata cache.

    • getHashKey

      protected final HashKey getHashKey()
      Hash key.
      Returns:
      The hash key.

    • getLocale

      protected final Locale getLocale()
      Locale.
      Returns:
      The locale.

    • getActiveView

      public final String getActiveView()
      The default active view for sessions created from this context.

      Returns the view name set via MarshallingContext.Builder.activeView(String), or null if no default active view has been configured (all properties visible).

      Returns:
      The default active view, or null.
      Since:
      10.0.0

    • isDefaultViewInclusion

      public final boolean isDefaultViewInclusion()
      Default-view-inclusion policy.

      Returns true (the default) when untagged properties — those carrying no MarshalledProp.view() declaration — are included under every active view. Returns false when MarshallingContext.Builder.disableDefaultViewInclusion() has been called, in which case untagged properties are excluded when any active view is in effect.

      Returns:
      true if untagged properties are included under every active view.
      Since:
      10.0.0

    • getMediaType

      protected final MediaType getMediaType()
      Media type.
      Returns:
      The media type.

    • getNotBeanClasses

      protected final List<ClassInfo> getNotBeanClasses()
      Bean class exclusions.
      Returns:
      The list of classes that are explicitly not beans.
      Never null.
      List is unmodifiable.
      See Also:
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.notBeanClasses(ClassInfo...)

    • getTimeZone

      protected final TimeZone getTimeZone()
      Time zone.
      Returns:
      The time zone.

    • getDurationFormat

      public final DurationFormat getDurationFormat()
      Duration wire format.
      Returns:
      The duration wire format.

    • getPeriodFormat

      public final PeriodFormat getPeriodFormat()
      Period wire format.
      Returns:
      The period wire format.

    • getCalendarFormat

      public final CalendarFormat getCalendarFormat()
      Calendar wire format.
      Returns:
      The calendar wire format.

    • getDateFormat

      public final DateFormat getDateFormat()
      Date wire format.
      Returns:
      The date wire format.

    • getTemporalFormat

      public final TemporalFormat getTemporalFormat()
      Temporal wire format.
      Returns:
      The temporal wire format.

    • getTimeZoneFormat

      public final TimeZoneFormat getTimeZoneFormat()
      Time-zone wire format.
      Returns:
      The time-zone wire format.

    • getLocaleFormat

      public final LocaleFormat getLocaleFormat()
      Locale wire format.
      Returns:
      The locale wire format.

    • getBinaryFormat

      public final BinaryFormat getBinaryFormat()
      Binary wire format.
      Returns:
      The binary wire format.

    • getEnumFormat

      public final EnumFormat getEnumFormat()
      Enum wire format.
      Returns:
      The enum wire format.

    • getUuidFormat

      public final UuidFormat getUuidFormat()
      UUID wire format.
      Returns:
      The UUID wire format.

    • getBitSetFormat

      public final BitSetFormat getBitSetFormat()
      BitSet wire format.
      Returns:
      The BitSet wire format.

    • getBigNumberFormat

      public final BigNumberFormat getBigNumberFormat()
      Big-number wire format.
      Returns:
      The big-number wire format.

    • getBooleanFormat

      public final BooleanFormat getBooleanFormat()
      Boolean wire format.
      Returns:
      The boolean wire format.

    • getFloatFormat

      public final FloatFormat getFloatFormat()
      Float / Double non-finite wire format.
      Returns:
      The float wire format.

    • getCurrencyFormat

      public final CurrencyFormat getCurrencyFormat()
      Currency wire format.
      Returns:
      The currency wire format.

    • getClassFormat

      public final ClassFormat getClassFormat()
      Class wire format.
      Returns:
      The class wire format.

    • getClassLoader

      public final ClassLoader getClassLoader()
      Session classloader.

      Returns the classloader explicitly configured via MarshallingContext.Builder.classLoader(ClassLoader), or null if none was set (callers should fall back to the thread-context classloader).

      Returns:
      The session classloader, or null if not set.

    • isIgnoreTransientFields

      protected final boolean isIgnoreTransientFields()
      Ignore transient fields.
      Returns:
      true if fields and methods marked as transient should not be ignored.
      See Also:
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.disableIgnoreTransientFields()

    • isNotABean

      protected final boolean isNotABean(ClassInfo ci)
      Determines whether the specified class is ignored as a bean class based on the various exclusion parameters specified on this context class.
      Parameters:
      ci - The class info being tested.
      Returns:
      true if the specified class matches any of the exclusion parameters.

    • object

      protected final ClassMeta<Object> object()
      Returns a reusable ClassMeta representation for the class Object.

      This ClassMeta is often used to represent "any object type" when an object type is not known.

      This method is identical to calling getClassMeta(Object.class) but uses a cached copy to avoid a hashmap lookup.

      Returns:
      The ClassMeta object associated with the Object class.

    • resolveType

      public BeanInfo<?> resolveType(AnnotationInfo<BeanProp> lastBeanProp, ClassInfo type, TypeVariables typeVarImpls)
      Description copied from interface: BeanTypeResolver
      Resolves the bean-property type-info for a property given its (optional) @BeanProp annotation and Java type.
      Specified by:
      resolveType in interface BeanTypeResolver
      Parameters:
      lastBeanProp - The last @BeanProp annotation found on the property's field/getter/setter, or null if none.
      type - The Java type of the property as derived from the field/getter/setter signature.
      typeVarImpls - Resolved type-variable substitutions for the enclosing class.
      Returns:
      The resolved type-info, or null if no resolution was possible.

    • objectType

      public BeanInfo<?> objectType()
      Description copied from interface: BeanTypeResolver
      Returns the type-info for Object.class (used as the fallback element/value type for raw/unparameterized collections and maps).
      Specified by:
      objectType in interface BeanTypeResolver
      Returns:
      Non-null type-info for Object.class.

    • properties

      protected FluentMap<String,Object> properties()
      Description copied from class: Context
      Returns the properties on this bean as a map for debugging.
      Overrides:
      properties in class Context
      Returns:
      The properties on this bean as a map for debugging.

    • resolveClassMeta

      protected final <T> ClassMeta<T> resolveClassMeta(AnnotationInfo<BeanProp> p, ClassInfo ci, TypeVariables typeVarImpls)
      Used for determining the class type on a method or field where a @BeanProp annotation may be present.
      Type Parameters:
      T - The class type we're wrapping.
      Parameters:
      p - The property annotation info on the type if there is one.
      ci - The class info for the type.
      typeVarImpls - Contains known resolved type parameters on the specified class so that we can result ParameterizedTypes and TypeVariables. Can be null if the information is not known.
      Returns:
      The new ClassMeta object wrapped around the type.

    • string

      protected final ClassMeta<String> string()
      Returns a reusable ClassMeta representation for the class String.

      This ClassMeta is often used to represent key types in maps.

      This method is identical to calling getClassMeta(String.class) but uses a cached copy to avoid a hashmap lookup.

      Returns:
      The ClassMeta object associated with the String class.
